languages.text: {n}Какое-то время Себериан молчит, и слышен только шум механизмов, поддерживающих в его теле жизнь. Наконец, он поднимает руку и изящным жестом демонстрирует себя.{/n} "Причина стоит прямо перед тобой. С того дня, как я получил в свои руки Патент, я делал все на благо династии. Я жертвовал всем, чтобы привести наш протекторат к процветанию — включая себя. Множество битв, через которые я прошел, не пощадили мое тело, и вскоре слабую плоть заменили импланты".

{n}For some time, Seberian is silent, and only the hum of the mechanisms sustaining his body can be heard. At last, he raises a hand and gestures to himself with an elegant flourish.{/n} "The reason stands before you. From the day I obtained the Warrant, everything I have done was for the good of the dynasty. To bring prosperity to our protectorate, I would sacrifice anything — including myself. The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."
languages.original_text: {n}Какое-то время Себериан молчит, и слышен только шум механизмов, поддерживающих в его теле жизнь. Наконец, он поднимает руку и изящным жестом демонстрирует себя.{/n} "Причина стоит прямо перед тобой. С того дня, как я получил в свои руки Патент, я делал все на благо династии. Я жертвовал всем, чтобы привести наш протекторат к процветанию — включая себя. Множество битв, через которые я прошел, не пощадили мое тело, и вскоре слабую плоть заменили импланты".

traits.locale_text: {n}For some time, Seberian is silent, and only the hum of the mechanisms sustaining his body can be heard. At last, he raises a hand and gestures to himself with an elegant flourish.{/n} "The reason stands before you. From the day I obtained the Warrant, I have done everything for the good of the dynasty. I sacrificed everything to bring our protectorate to prosperity, including myself. The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."

From the day I obtained the Warrant, everything I have done was for the good of the dynasty. To bring prosperity to our protectorate, I would sacrifice anything — including myself. The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."

languages.text: {n}Seberian schweigt eine Weile und es ist nur das Summen seiner lebenserhaltenden Mechanismen zu hören. Schließlich hebt er eine Hand und deutet mit einer ausladenden Geste auf sich.{/n} "Die Gründe stehen vor Euch. Seit dem Tag, an dem ich den Handelsbrief erhielt, geschah alles, was ich tat zum Wohl der Dynastie. Ich würde alles opfern, um den Wohlstand unseres Protektorats zu mehren ... sogar mich selbst. Die zahllosen Schlachten, die ich schlug, haben ihren Tribut gefordert, und bald wurde mein schwaches Fleisch durch Implantate ersetzt."
languages.original_text: {n}For some time, Seberian is silent, and only the hum of the mechanisms sustaining his body can be heard. At last, he raises a hand and gestures to himself with an elegant flourish.{/n} "The reason stands before you. From the day I obtained the Warrant, everything I have done was for the good of the dynasty. To bring prosperity to our protectorate, I would sacrifice anything — including myself. The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian schweigt eine Weile und es ist nur das Summen seiner lebenserhaltenden Mechanismen zu hören. Schließlich hebt er eine Hand und deutet mit einer ausladenden Geste auf sich.{/n} "Die Gründe stehen vor Euch. Seit dem Tag, an dem ich den Handelsbrief erhielt, geschah alles, was ich tat zum Wohl der Dynastie. Ich würde alles opfern, um den Wohlstand unseres Protektorats zu mehren ... sogar mich selbst. Die zahllosen Schlachten, die ich schlug, haben ihren Tribut gefordert, und bald wurde mein schwaches Fleisch durch Implantate ersetzt."

languages.text: {n}Seberian garde un long silence, et seul le vrombissement des mécanismes maintenant son corps en vie se fait entendre. Il finit par lever une main et faire un geste élégant dans sa direction.{/n} « La raison se tient devant vous. Dès l'instant où j'ai reçu la lettre de marque, je n'ai plus eu d'autre but que de faire progresser notre dynastie, et pour faire prospérer notre protectorat, j'étais prêt à tout sacrifier, à commencer par moi-même. Toutes les batailles auxquelles j'ai dû participer ont fini par avoir raison de mon corps, et ma chair fragile s'est vite trouvée remplacée par des implants. »
languages.original_text: {n}For some time, Seberian is silent, and only the hum of the mechanisms sustaining his body can be heard. At last, he raises a hand and gestures to himself with an elegant flourish.{/n} "The reason stands before you. From the day I obtained the Warrant, everything I have done was for the good of the dynasty. To bring prosperity to our protectorate, I would sacrifice anything — including myself. The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian garde un long silence, et seul le vrombissement des mécanismes maintenant son corps en vie se fait entendre. Il finit par lever une main et faire un geste élégant dans sa direction.{/n} « La raison se tient devant vous. Dès l'instant où j'ai reçu la lettre de marque, je n'ai plus eu d'autre but que de faire progresser notre dynastie, et pour faire prospérer notre protectorat, j'étais prêt à tout sacrifier, à commencer par moi-même. Toutes les batailles auxquelles j'ai dû participer ont fini par avoir raison de mon corps, et ma chair fragile s'est vite trouvée remplacée par des implants. »

languages.text: {n}Por un momento, el único sonido que emite Seberian es el de los mecanismos que sostienen su cuerpo. Después, levanta una mano y se señala a sí mismo ostentosamente.{/n} «Tiene delante el motivo. Desde el día en el que obtuve la Patente, todo lo que he hecho ha sido por la dinastía. Para que el protectorado prospere, lo sacrificaría todo, incluido mi propio ser. Las interminables batallas que he librado pasaron factura a mi cuerpo y la frágil carne pronto dio paso a los implantes».
languages.original_text: {n}For some time, Seberian is silent, and only the hum of the mechanisms sustaining his body can be heard. At last, he raises a hand and gestures to himself with an elegant flourish.{/n} "The reason stands before you. From the day I obtained the Warrant, everything I have done was for the good of the dynasty. To bring prosperity to our protectorate, I would sacrifice anything — including myself. The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."

Las interminables batallas que he librado pasaron factura a mi cuerpo y la frágil carne pronto dio paso a los implantes».

languages.text: {n}Seberian bir süre sessiz kalıyor, sadece vücudunu ayakta tutan mekanizmaların uğultusu duyuluyor. Sonunda elini kaldırıp zarif bir hareketle kendini gösteriyor.{/n} "Nedeni karşında duruyor. Ruhsatname'yi aldığım günden beri yaptığım her şey, hanedanlığın iyiliği içindi. Protektoramıza refah getirmek için kendim de dâhil her şeyi feda ederdim. Katlandığım sayısız savaş, vücudumu yıprattı. Çok geçmeden zayıf etimin yerini implantlar aldı."
languages.original_text: {n}For some time, Seberian is silent, and only the hum of the mechanisms sustaining his body can be heard. At last, he raises a hand and gestures to himself with an elegant flourish.{/n} "The reason stands before you. From the day I obtained the Warrant, everything I have done was for the good of the dynasty. To bring prosperity to our protectorate, I would sacrifice anything — including myself. The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."

Sonunda elini kaldırıp zarif bir hareketle kendini gösteriyor.{/n} "Nedeni karşında duruyor. Ruhsatname'yi aldığım günden beri yaptığım her şey, hanedanlığın iyiliği içindi. Protektoramıza refah getirmek için kendim de dâhil her şeyi feda ederdim. Katlandığım sayısız savaş, vücudumu yıprattı. Çok geçmeden zayıf etimin yerini implantlar aldı."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安沉默了一阵，只有维持他身体运作的机械在嗡嗡作响。终于，他抬起一只手，优雅地往自己身上一指。{/n}“原因就在你眼前。从我拿到贸易授状的那一天起，我所做的一切都是为了王朝。为了让我们的属地繁荣昌盛，我可以牺牲一切，包括我自己。我所经历的无数场战斗已经摧残了我的身体，很快，脆弱的血肉就被植入物取代了。”
languages.original_text: {n}For some time, Seberian is silent, and only the hum of the mechanisms sustaining his body can be heard. At last, he raises a hand and gestures to himself with an elegant flourish.{/n} "The reason stands before you. From the day I obtained the Warrant, everything I have done was for the good of the dynasty. To bring prosperity to our protectorate, I would sacrifice anything — including myself. The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安沉默了一阵，只有维持他身体运作的机械在嗡嗡作响。终于，他抬起一只手，优雅地往自己身上一指。{/n}“原因就在你眼前。从我拿到贸易授状的那一天起，我所做的一切都是为了王朝。为了让我们的属地繁荣昌盛，我可以牺牲一切，包括我自己。我所经历的无数场战斗已经摧残了我的身体，很快，脆弱的血肉就被植入物取代了。”

languages.text: {n}セベリアンはしばらく沈黙し、彼の体を支える機械の唸り声だけが聞こえる。そして、彼は手を挙げ、優雅に身振りを見せる。{/n}「その理由は目の前に立っている。王令を得てから、私は王朝のために尽くしてきた。保護国に繁栄をもたらすために、私は何だって犠牲にした。私自身も。数えきれないほどの戦いを耐え、肉体は機械に置き換えられたのだ。」

The countless battles I endured took their toll upon my body, and soon frail flesh was replaced with implants."
